care.summary: Sun-loving woody herb; prefers dryish soil and excellent drainage.
care.water: Allow soil to dry between waterings; avoid soggy roots
care.fertilizer: Light feed in spring; avoid heavy nitrogen
care.toxicity: Culinary herb; generally safe when used as food
tips: Prune after flowering to keep bushy
Great in pots with drainage holes
Harvest stems in the morning for best aroma
